Glenwood Community League – Glenwood is a large neighborhood in west Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. The neighborhood has a mixture of residential and commercial development. Glenwood became a part of Edmonton in 1964 when the Town of Jasper Place amalgamated with Edmonton. The neighborhood is bounded on the north by Stony Plain Road, on the south by 95 Avenue, on the east by 156 Street and on the west by 170 Street. The Edmonton Transit System's Jasper Place terminal is located at the north east corner of the neighbourhood. – Wikipedia
